name: Quick Bread Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb whole wheat sourdough bread, cut into 1 1/2 in cubes
1/2 pkg torn Italian-style mixed salad greens (10oz)
1 medium tomato, cut into thin wedges
1/4 cup cherry tomatoes or yellow sweet peppers, halved
recipeInstructions:
1. In a screw-top jar, combine olive oil, red wine vinegar, snipped fresh oregano, sugar, salt, and pepper.
2. Cover tightly and shake well to mix.
3. In a large salad bowl, combine bread cubes, torn Italian-style mixed greens, tomato wedges, cherry tomatoes or sweet peppers, and olives.
4. Add the dressing; toss gently and serve.
